personal.name: Peerawet Chursuk
personal.title: Software Engineer · Solution-Driven Full Stack Developer

profile: Full stack developer with an industrial-engineering background, now building government-sector enterprise systems in React & TypeScript. My strongest work happens upstream of the code turning vague or conflicting requirements into a system design that fits the constraints of the codebase that already exists then shipping it fast with an AI-assisted workflow. Comfortable moving between developer, system analyst and UX roles within the same sprint.

recognition.detail: · Top story-point performer (28 SP / 11 cards), Chanwanich, 2026
· “Excellent” band; full marks on work quality & accuracy

experience.company: Chanwanich Co., Ltd. · Sathon, Bangkok · Hybrid

bullets.lead: Unblocked a Phase-3 requirement without refactoring Phase 1–2.
bullets.text: The client needed per-user permissions on a role-based system, and the obvious path meant rewriting every permission API. I redesigned the permission screen from a flat row list into an expandable multi-level tree, so a per-user grant became a child permission the system already supported. The client bought into the approach, which avoided weeks of refactoring.

bullets.lead: Caught a form design that the database couldn't support.
bullets.text: A Figma form let users pick several ranks at once, but each rank belongs to exactly one position, so one position with many ranks was impossible in the data. I made the fields cascade: pick more than one rank and the position field disappears, which was exactly what the client wanted.

bullets.lead: Designed how users cross into Phase 3.
bullets.text: Phase 3 shipped as a separate repo on its own URL, so I added a banner dropdown that lets users move between Phase 1, 2 and 3 as if it were a single app.

bullets.lead: Shipped a Phase-2 dashboard in a day that the vendor had budgeted a week for.
bullets.text: It saved the client a ฿15,000-per-day late penalty.
Merged the outsourced team's code into the main project.
Stood in as system analyst on the rushed Phase-2 work while the team's SA was tied up managing the vendor.

bullets.lead: Helped launch Thai ESGX, the firm's first new fund in over 4 years.
bullets.text: A tax-deduction fund that now holds over ฿29,381,028 in assets.
Integrated a local Ollama (Mistral) assistant so staff could ask questions against CRM data.
Maintained live systems where the legacy code couldn't be changed, so every fix had to work around.
Gathered requirements directly from the customer.

projects.name: Dormy
projects.lead: Full-stack multi-tenant SaaS for dormitory owners, built to run my family's dormitory business.
projects.description: Monthly billing with metered or flat-rate utilities, rental-contract management, bulk bill import via Excel & Google Sheets, and a revenue/expense analytics dashboard with PDF contract & receipt generation.
